task_description: Complete portfolio website overhaul: ultra-high performance optimization (remove Three.js/GSAP, CSS-only effects), enhanced projects section with rich content and photos, compact mobile menu, floating action button with AI chatbot (OpenAI integration), enhanced contact section, and decorative icons throughout.

verification.summary: TypeScript type-checking passes (npx tsc --noEmit exits 0). Production build succeeds in 356ms. Total JS bundle: 444.93KB main + code-split chunks (AIChatbot 7.54KB, Projects 5.39KB, ProjectDetail 11.04KB, Contact 25.78KB). Main chunk gzips to 141KB. No vendor-three chunk. No Three.js/GSAP imports remain. All 4 features implemented and verified.
